name: GOLFTEC Metairie
about: GOLFTEC Metairie is a high-tech golf training facility that focuses on data-driven instruction and club fitting. The venue utilizes advanced technology including OPTIMOTION motion capture, high-speed cameras, and launch monitors to provide detailed swing analysis and feedback. Services include private golf lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships, all aimed at helping golfers improve their skills through personalized coaching and technology-enabled training. The facility is designed to create a structured learning environment where students can receive expert guidance and practice in a controlled setting with real-time data feedback.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced technology including OPTIMOTION and launch monitors for detailed swing analysis
Personalized coaching with certified PGA professionals
Club fitting services using launch monitors to optimize equipment
Structured practice environment with coach-designed training plans
Data-driven feedback that helps identify and correct swing issues

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned but specific model not specified

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: You can bring your own clubs, but club rentals are also available at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, so it's likely not available on-site.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Time for 18-hole simulations isn't specified, but sessions are typically based on lesson duration or bay rental time.

faq.question: Is this facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers junior programs and is designed to accommodate golfers of all skill levels, including beginners and youth.
